name: Weather
description: Fetch real-time weather and forecasts for any location. Uses Open-Meteo (free, no API key required).
examples: Will it rain tomorrow in London?
Give me the 7-day forecast for Tokyo
What's the temperature in New York right now?

commands.name: weather
commands.shortDescription: Current weather and forecast for your location
commands.description: Use the weather_current tool to fetch weather for the user's location. If a location is specified after /weather use that, otherwise check brain config for a saved location or ask. Show temperature, conditions, humidity, and wind speed. Include today's forecast. Add a practical tip (bring an umbrella, apply sunscreen, etc.).

commands.name: forecast
commands.description: Use the weather_forecast tool with days=7 for the specified location (or ask for one). Present the week's forecast in a compact day-by-day format with high/low temperatures and main conditions. Highlight any significant weather events (rain, storms, heatwave).
